name: Elemental Transfiguration: Aquabreeze Blessing
title: Elemental Transfiguration: Aquabreeze Blessing
desc: Winds rage, waves surge, and the sea rises to meet the sky.
in_play_description:
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Hydro Dice and 2 Anemo Dice.
After you trigger a Hydro Swirl reactions: Discard this card, then choose either Aquabreeze Blessing: Waterburst or Aquabreeze Blessing: Vortex and add it to your Hand.

skills.desc:
Elemental Transfiguration: Hydro Anemo
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Hydro Dice and 2 Anemo Dice.
After you trigger a Swirl (Hydro) reaction: Discard this card, then choose either Aquabreeze Blessing: Waterburst or Aquabreeze Blessing: Vortex and add it to your Hand.
